ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Steven Pollak appeared via zoom for Susan Sarantitis (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Mr. Pollak's petition not signed by him, and that he can file a document addressing the issue. The Amended first and final report of executor etc., is taken under submission. Subject to filing a supplement affirming support of the petition.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Prieto: Not reported.
